title: Malvern picnic & Kate & Jamie's farm

main_route.excerpt: First we spent a day having a picnic at Malvern, visiting a quilting exhibition.
Then we went to Kate & Jamie's farm for one night, very warm and humid.
main_route.note: Location unknown; farm name only — see unresolved entry

unresolved.issue: No location given for Kate & Jamie's farm; identity and whereabouts unknown — could be near Malvern or elsewhere in the Midlands/Welsh borders
unresolved.excerpt: Then we went to Kate & Jamie's farm for one night, very warm and humid.

summary: A short domestic trip in May 1989 beginning with a day picnic at Malvern including a visit to a quilting exhibition, followed by one night at the farm of friends Kate and Jamie. The family's new van was used and the boys played on bikes and a water slide.
extraction_notes: Single diary page (A_0003_R), dated only 'May' with no year given — year 1989 taken from trip_id. Malvern is explicit and unambiguous. 'Kate & Jamie's farm' provides no geographic detail; it is retained as an overnight_base with approximate:true and flagged as unresolved. No crossings or excursions. Peter was mentioned as being sprayed by the van tap when Simon first showed the van — this is an anecdote, not a stop.
